description_long: A classic hamburger sits on a round white plate, accompanied by a serving of golden French fries and a few pieces of saucy chicken wings. The hamburger features a lightly toasted sesame seed bun, with a visible layer of melted cheese, crisp lettuce, and a thick beef patty. Slices of tomato, pickles, and possibly onions are layered beneath the top bun, with a wooden skewer piercing through the center to hold everything together. The fries are arranged in a small pile, while the chicken wings are glazed with a reddish sauce and placed beside a portion of shredded cabbage or coleslaw. The plate is simple and unadorned, emphasizing the hearty, urban meal presentation. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a casual street food or diner setting.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with cheese, lettuce, and assorted toppings sits on a white plate with fries, chicken wings, and coleslaw. The meal is visually appealing and typical of urban fast food.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with fries on the left side and the top bun and cheese clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the melted cheese, lettuce, and a portion of coleslaw and saucy chicken wings beside the burger.
description_view_2: The back of the hamburger is visible, with the fries and chicken wings more prominent and the coleslaw peeking out from under the bun.
description_view_3: The hamburger is seen with the fries in the foreground, chicken wings and coleslaw to the left, and the skewer centered in the bun.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, cheese, and pickles are layered beneath the top bun, with tomato and possibly onions visible in the middle. The toppings are distributed evenly, with cheese melting over the patty and vegetables peeking out from the sides.
